compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect architect-foundation guided mode changes
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing documentation to reflect --auto flag, batched writes, ADR always-on, and re-run safety
**Why**: Future agents and users need accurate docs about the updated architect-foundation behavior
**Scope**:
- IN: Update CLAUDE.md (architect-foundation references, --auto usage), KNOWN-ISSUES.md if applicable
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately documents the --auto flag, batched write confirmation, ADR always-on behavior, and re-run idempotency
  ← Satisfies: all SCs (documentation reflects changes)

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Test
